holdings.infoBox: FNY is an equity ETF with a total of 228 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sterling Infrastructure stock at 1.32%, TTM Technologies at 1.32%, DigitalOcean Holdings at 1.31%, Sanmina at 1.24%, and Vicor at 1.24%.

overview.description: The First Trust Mid Cap Growth AlphaDEX Fund (FNY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX Mid Cap Growth index. The fund tracks a tiered equal-weighted index of mid-cap growth stocks selected by AlphaDex selection methodology from the S&P 400 Index. FNY was launched on Apr 18, 2011 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: NASDAQ AlphaDEX Mid Cap Growth Index
